function.name: screen_context
function.description: Collect, monitor, or read the user's current foreground-window context. It captures active window metadata plus app/UIA/OCR text, stores latest/recent events, and manages queued screen interventions for proactive chat assistance after the knowledge base is built.

action.description: Screen context action to run. capture_once reads the current foreground window now; start_polling/stop_polling control background capture; pending_interventions/consume_interventions read proactive assistance candidates.

limit.description: Number of recent events or queued interventions to return.
